description: Universal section roles and L1 archetypes for Track A benchmark tasks. section_slug MUST equal path_role in bundle registry.

path_roles.segment_policy: Segment definitions and reporting policy (Item 1 or equivalent)
path_roles.compensation_disclosure: Stock-based compensation / equity comp disclosure (note location varies by filer)
path_roles.segment_financials: Reportable segment financial table for the scored period
path_roles.revenue_disaggregation: Revenue disaggregation or secondary cross-check note
path_roles.consolidated_primary: Consolidated income statement or primary total
path_roles.narrative_fx: MD&A segment narrative with FX or reported vs constant-currency growth
path_roles.narrative_organic: MD&A organic / constant-currency revenue bridge table
path_roles.narrative_guidance: Management guidance commentary (earnings call or MD&A outlook)
path_roles.quantitative_actuals: Subsequent filing quantitative actuals vs prior guidance

prior_year_column.description: Same note layout but prior fiscal period column only

prior_quarter_actuals.description: Same KPI table but prior quarter column only

wrong_ytd_window.description: Same KPI table but wrong YTD month window (e.g. six months vs nine)

F_exact.description: Segment net sales sum equals consolidated (no adjustment line)

F_adjustment.description: Segment sum differs from consolidated; reconciling item required

F_guidance_drift.description: Compare management guidance (grain in task GT) to subsequent filing actuals
